Revenue = sessions × 38 kWh × €0.58/kWh · Basis: Iberdrola P&L Projection model · WACC 7%

Avg Network Util %

Fleet Growth vs Now
Utilization = P80 sessions / charger capacity (20h window, 70% efficiency). Target: ≤90% at peak hour. >95% = cars turned away.

MAP LEGEND fill = grid status · border = tier
Marker fill = Grid Status
Sufficient (≥1.8 MW)
Moderate (0.6–1.8 MW)
Congested (<0.6 MW)
Border/Shape = Tier
Square = Tier 1 (Upgrade Iberdrola)
Square = Tier 2 (Partner Co-location)
Circle = Tier 3 (New Partner)
Dashed = Data gap (unknown grid)
Grey X = No-partner site (removed)
Orange circle = AFIR coverage gap
